name: Chewy Chortles
recipeIngredient: 1 package fluffy white frosting (cherry fluff or lemon fluff)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Prepare the frosting according to the package directions.
3. In a large bowl, combine the shredded coconut and chocolate chips.
4. Stir in the frosting using a fork until everything is evenly mixed.
5. Using two forks, drop small mounds (about one tablespoon-sized) onto a lightly greased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 17 to 20 minutes.
TIPS: Store uncovered with waxed paper, not in an airtight container. Allow the chortles to cool slightly before removing from the baking sheet.
